name: Noob vs Noob
description: Noob vs Noob is free online running game with noobs. All you need to do is to win the race and enter a new level. Jump over obstacles, collect coins, time and do your best to win every race.
instructions: Arrow keys on PC or screen buttons on mobile
tags: Android, Avoid, Collecting, jump, Kids, Minecraft, Mobile, Online, run, running, Skill
